title: VS Grapples
description: Adds Grappling Hook Mod: Restitched support to Valkyrien Skies Ships
body:
Allows Grappling Hook Mod: Restitched hooks to be towed by Valkyrien Skies ships
![how the hook works](https://i.ibb.co/tcCF26d/Minecraft-1-20-1-Singleplayer2024-10-1922-18-08-ezgif-com-optimize.gif)
